policy.semver_minor: Within the same MAJOR release line, MINOR bumps are expected to be backward compatible for the gRPC package devault.agent.v1 unless noted in CHANGELOG.
policy.semver_major: A new MAJOR may introduce a new protobuf package (e.g. devault.agent.v2), change RPC semantics, or require coordinated upgrades. Migration steps are documented in CHANGELOG and docs/RELEASE.md checklists.
policy.proto_package: The gRPC package devault.agent.v1 is independent from application SemVer; both are negotiated on Heartbeat and Register.

capability_notes.s3_presign_bundle: Control plane uses S3-compatible presigned PUT/GET for bundle and manifest.
capability_notes.multipart_upload: Large bundle uploads use S3 multipart when over DEVAULT_S3_MULTIPART_THRESHOLD_BYTES.
capability_notes.multipart_resume: Multipart state survives Agent restart when control plane and Agent are 0.4.0+.

manifest.notes: Optional for restore: older manifests without producer_fields are still valid.

matrices.notes: Homogeneous 0.5.x pairing; see CHANGELOG 0.5.0 for enrollment, allowlist, and UI/REST parity.
0.5.x control plane with agents not yet on 0.5.x; follow CHANGELOG migration for Register, enrollment, and metrics label changes.
Multipart cross-restart resume requires this pairing (or newer).
Multipart upload without cross-process resume checkpointing.
Older agents may omit agent_release on Heartbeat; control plane allows by default unless DEVAULT_GRPC_REQUIRE_AGENT_VERSION=true.

current.default_max_tested_agent: same as control plane release when DEVAULT_GRPC_MAX_TESTED_AGENT_VERSION is unset

ci_e2e.notes: When previous_minor_git_ref is set to a resolvable git ref (e.g. v0.3.0), the workflow adds two cross-build rows (current CP + older Agent image, and the reverse). Leave empty to run only the homogeneous row (same SHA for both images).
